ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable debugging in console logs. Useful for troubleshooting and development.
ast.target: 在控制台日志中启用调试。对于故障排除和开发很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Check if all dependencies are installed and if it can works correctly with your current settings to communicate with Vikunja. If there is only one Notice, everything is fine. If there are more, please enable debugging and check the console for more information.
ast.target: 检查所有依赖项是否已安装，以及它是否能与您当前的设置正确配合以与Vikunja通信。如果只有一条通知，则一切正常。如果有更多通知，请启用调试并检查控制台以获取更多信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable the cron job to sync tasks automatically. If disabled, you have to trigger the sync manually via command.
ast.target: 启用定时任务以自动同步任务。如果禁用，您必须通过命令手动触发同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the cache will be written to disk immediately after a change. If disabled, the cache will be written to disk after a certain interval. If you experience performance issues, you should disable this and use a frequency.
ast.target: 如果启用，缓存将在更改后立即写入磁盘。如果禁用，缓存将在一定间隔后写入磁盘。如果您遇到性能问题，应禁用此选项并使用频率设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will check for changes in Vault and Vikunja and update the tasks vice versa, but prioritize the changes in Obsidian. Useful, if you want to use Vikunja, but do not make any changes directly on the markdown files while obsidian is closed.
ast.target: 这将检查保险库和Vikunja中的更改并更新任务，但优先处理Obsidian中的更改。如果您想使用Vikunja，但不想在Obsidian关闭时直接对Markdown文件进行任何更改，这很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This project will be used to place new tasks created by this plugin.
ast.target: 此项目将用于放置此插件创建的新任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Because vikunja does not move done tasks to the correct bucket, you have to select the bucket where the done tasks are placed, so this plugin can do it for you.
ast.target: 因为vikunja不会将已完成的任务移动到正确的桶中，所以您必须选择放置已完成任务的桶，以便此插件可以为您完成此操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Append tasks to the daily note at the bottom.
ast.target: 将任务追加到每日笔记的底部。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert tasks after the given string. The plugin will search in current daily note for the string and insert tasks after it.
ast.target: 在给定字符串后插入任务。插件将在当前每日笔记中搜索该字符串，并在其后插入任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add tags that should be ignored when using tags in text. Tags added here will not be converted to text when pushed to vikunja. Comma separated.
ast.target: 添加在文本中使用标签时应忽略的标签。此处添加的标签在推送到vikunja时不会转换为文本。以逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Please wait until the projects are loaded. If this message still there after a few seconds, please check your Vikunja Host and Access Token. Enable debugging and check the console for more information.
ast.target: 请等待项目加载完成。如果几秒后此消息仍然存在，请检查您的Vikunja主机和访问令牌。启用调试并检查控制台以获取更多信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will create a task in Vikunja, if you move the cursor and the found task on last line was not synced to Vikunja. Useful, if you want to create a task quickly and do not want to sync manually.
ast.target: 如果您移动光标且最后一行找到的任务尚未同步到Vikunja，这将在Vikunja中创建一个任务。如果您想快速创建任务且不想手动同步，这很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will update the completed status of tasks immediately to Vikunja.
ast.target: 这将立即将任务的完成状态更新到Vikunja。
